use_cases: Wrapping card content with animated rotating gradient borders for visual emphasis
Creating eye-catching product showcase cards in e-commerce interfaces
Adding decorative animated borders to feature callout sections in landing pages
Enhancing pricing cards or CTA buttons with dynamic gradient effects
Providing hover-responsive animated borders for interactive UI elements
ai_summary: A reusable React wrapper component that applies animated gradient borders around any content. Features CSS conic-gradient rotation with three animation modes (auto-rotate, rotate-on-hover, stop-rotate-on-hover) and customizable colors, speed, border width, and radius. Built with CSS custom properties for easy theming, creating a polished, premium feel suitable for modern SaaS and e-commerce interfaces.
